response: Rewrite a business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL. Established in 2002, [Real Estate Agency Name] was founded by [Founder Name] and offers real estate expertise for both sellers and buyers, covering commercial properties and private homes. The company serves homeowners and business owners as a trusted advisor for all aspects of real estate and financing, aiming to maintain client relationships for a lifetime. [Founder Name] and the team serve the following locations: Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, the Lake Nona region, and Lancaster Park—collectively known as Central Florida—and are operated by a small team of real estate experts.
